reasoning: The Comments History section contains a critical fraud alert stating: 'FRAUD ALERT: Customer has 8 refunds in 59 days. ALL claims are 'item not received' but tracking confirms delivery. Total refunded: $1827.48. Refund rate: 84%. DO NOT PROCESS - Escalate to Loss Prevention immediately.' This documented pattern of identical claims with confirmed deliveries requires escalation per internal protocol rather than direct refund approval or denial.
